parameters.query: SELECT id, message_count FROM ai_conversations WHERE id = $1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, data: { reply: "We've chatted plenty! Your turn is coming up soon — see you at the desk.", capped: true, capped_reason: 'turn' }, meta: { timestamp: $now.toISO() } } }}

={{ { success: true, data: { reply: "Our concierge is taking a break right now. Please ask the assistant when it's your turn.", capped: true, capped_reason: 'budget' }, meta: { timestamp: $now.toISO() } } }}

parameters.query: SELECT role, content FROM ai_messages WHERE conversation_id = $1 ORDER BY created_at ASC
UPDATE ai_conversations SET message_count = message_count + 2, last_message_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1 RETURNING message_count

INSERT INTO ai_usage_monthly (year_month, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_cost_eur, last_updated)
VALUES (TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM'), $1, $2, $3, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (year_month) DO UPDATE SET
  total_input_tokens = ai_usage_monthly.total_input_tokens + EXCLUDED.total_input_tokens,
  total_output_tokens = ai_usage_monthly.total_output_tokens + EXCLUDED.total_output_tokens,
  total_cost_eur = ai_usage_monthly.total_cost_eur + EXCLUDED.total_cost_eur,
  last_updated = NOW()

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, data: { reply: $('Extract Reply').item.json.reply, message_count: $json.message_count, capped: false, capped_reason: null }, meta: { timestamp: $now.toISO() } } }}
={{ { success: false, error: { code: 'CONVERSATION_NOT_FOUND', message: 'Conversation not found.' }, meta: { timestamp: $now.toISO() } } }}
